channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.
channel.copyright: Copyright:(C) Sun, 28 Jun 2026 18:22:33 IST Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd, http://in.indiatimes.com/policyterms/1554651.cms

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: Three Indian-origin men jailed in London for running £174,000 drugs network
item.description: In a significant crackdown, authorities have dismantled a large drug trafficking operation in London, orchestrated by incarcerated dealer Hardeep Thind. Three men of Indian descent, including an active magistrate, received prison sentences for their involvement in distributing cocaine and heroin worth £174,000. Following Thind's release, the illegal network expanded, prompting police to conduct thorough investigations, resulting in numerous arrests and convictions.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: A tale of two photographs: Palestinian journalist's images capture horror of Israeli prisons
item.description: Israeli authorities placed Bani Mufleh under administrative detention in June 2025 and released him in January 2026. According to the PPS, he suffered a severe brain haemorrhage two days after his release and was rushed to hospital in critical condition. He subsequently underwent several surgeries and continues to receive treatment for complications the organisation says were linked to his detention.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Geo News off air for 15 days after Pakistan suspends licence over Muharram show
item.description: The Pakistan Electronic Media Regulatory Authority (PEMRA) said the channel broadcast "religious visualisations" during its June 26 transmission, adding that the material had the potential to offend viewers, undermine religious harmony and create law and order concerns during one of the holiest and most sensitive periods in the Islamic calendar.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Ukraine strikes major Russian oil refinery in drone barrage; two killed
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 4 lakh dogs vanished before South Korea's meat ban. Where did hundreds of thousands of dogs go?
item.description: South Korea's impending ban on the dog meat trade leaves the fate of hundreds of thousands of dogs uncertain. While farms are closing and compensation is offered, official records show minimal adoptions or shelter transfers. Animal welfare groups suspect many dogs were slaughtered before the law takes effect, highlighting the industry's unregulated past and the challenges faced by former farmers.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 3 firefighters killed battling wildfires on Colorado-Utah border, blazes spread across US West
item.description: Tragedy struck as three firefighters lost their lives battling blazes along the Colorado-Utah border, with two others injured. Extreme weather conditions are fueling widespread wildfires across the western US, including a massive blaze in southwest Utah that has scorched over 144 square miles. Officials are grappling with difficult terrain and dangerously low humidity, leading to a severe wildfire season and emergency declarations in multiple states.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: UAE condemns Iranian missile, drone attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Iraqi security forces raid Baghdad Green Zone, arrest MPs in anti-corruption crackdown
item.description: Baghdad's high-security Green Zone saw a significant crackdown as Iraqi forces arrested politicians and officials in a sweeping anti-corruption drive. Judicial orders led to pre-dawn raids, targeting individuals implicated in financial corruption and potentially linked to smuggling and funding armed factions. This operation precedes Prime Minister Zaidi's US visit, signaling his commitment to reforms amidst ongoing investigations.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'I do not believe in free press': Uganda military chief orders media shutdown of major outlets
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Prince Harry may cancel upcoming UK visit with Meghan, children after security setback
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Fake News': Donald Trump on book that says he leaves leftover snack, silverware on bedroom floor
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Europe heatwave turns deadly as France records 1,000 excess deaths
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 124 drones downed, civilians killed: Russia-Ukraine cross-border attacks escalate
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Think like a wartime PM': Ex-military chief sets 'Moscow test' for Andy Burnham after Keir Starmer's exit
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Watch: Joe Biden struggles to find stage exit after speech targeting Donald Trump
item.description: Former President Joe Biden delivered a strong speech attacking Donald Trump at a Maryland summit, criticizing his policies and calling them "vanity projects" and corrupt. The 83-year-old, who relied on a teleprompter and coughed during his remarks, also appeared to briefly search for the correct exit from the stage. This follows another recent on-stage moment where he seemed disoriented.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Millions drop Obamacare after Trump-backed subsidy rollback sends premiums soaring
item.description: Millions of Americans have lost their Obamacare health insurance as enhanced federal subsidies expired, causing premium costs to skyrocket. Over five million have dropped coverage, leading to a significant enrollment drop. While the Trump administration points to fraud, experts attribute the decline to unaffordable premiums, raising concerns about market stability and future insurance availability.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: The dark knight of Jalisco: Mexico's 'Batman' hunts motorcycle thieves, leaves them taped to lampposts
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Suit, tie and a splash: NYC mayor Zohran Mamdani revives pool tradition in full formal wear — video
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has revived a decade-old tradition by taking a ceremonial plunge into a public pool, marking the start of the summer swimming season. Dressed in a full suit and tie, Mamdani's dive into the Thomas Jefferson Pool in East Harlem also celebrated 90 years of public swimming in the city, a legacy initiated by Mayor Fiorello LaGuardia.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Candace Owens questions Erika Kirk's 'vision from God' remark in resurfaced Charlie Kirk interview
item.description: Candace Owens reignited online debate after revisiting a past interview with the late Charlie Kirk, focusing on his wife Erika's suggestion that he keep his phone on the day of the assassination attempt. Owens questioned the unusual remark and implied it deserved closer scrutiny. Kirk had explained he witnessed the incident unfold from a gym before alerting his team that "something is very wrong." His account has resurfaced following his death.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: Nick White blasts Clavicular over viral kiss with trans model, says he destroyed the image that made him famous
item.description: Nick White criticized Clavicular after a viral video showed the influencer kissing Polish transgender model Adeli Pali, claiming the incident had severely damaged the image that made him popular. During his livestream, White argued Clavicular's brand would "never be the same" and compared the controversy to other influencers who lost credibility after public incidents. The clip has sparked widespread debate online, with opinions divided over its impact on Clavicular's reputation.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta
